description: Triggers when the user wants to optimize content for AI search engines — ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews — including brand mentions, llms.txt, AI crawler access, and passage-level citability
should_trigger: How do I optimize my content to appear in ChatGPT search results and Perplexity citations?
My site isn't showing in Google AI Overviews — what can I do?
Analyze my site's GEO readiness and give me a citability score
How do I create llms.txt and allow AI crawlers in robots.txt?
What content structure gets cited most by AI search engines?
My brand isn't mentioned by ChatGPT or Perplexity — how do I fix that?
Optimize my passages to be 134-167 words for AI citation
should_not_trigger: Fix my Google Search ranking for a specific keyword
Improve my click-through rate from organic search
Add Open Graph tags to my pages
